calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Both Defendants
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Sara Lerschen, #6213.

David P. Adams, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West, a California Banking Corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Tritan Services, LLC, an Illinois Limited Liability Company; Theodore Owano, an individual.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $52,109.55
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,019.89
Costs: $1,138.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $54,267.94
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
